description_long: This is a large, eight-wheeled armored combat tactical vehicle with a digital camouflage paint scheme in shades of tan, brown, and green. The vehicle features a sloped front hull for deflection and protection, with reinforced armor plating covering the entire body. On the roof, there is a visible turret equipped with a mounted machine gun, as well as several antennas for communication. The sides of the vehicle display large, rugged off-road tires and vented panels for engine cooling. The rear section is boxy, with additional armor and exhaust vents, and the overall design suggests a focus on troop transport and battlefield survivability.
description: A heavily armored, eight-wheeled combat vehicle with digital camouflage, a roof-mounted turret, and reinforced body panels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped armored hull, two antennas, and the wide stance of the front wheels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the eight large off-road tires, vented side panels, and the roof-mounted turret.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the boxy armored back, dual exhaust vents, and rear-facing features.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the same eight-tire configuration, side vents, and visible turret details.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible roof-mounted turret with a machine gun; located centrally on the roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped, and modular armor plating; reinforced panels on all sides.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Digital camouflage pattern in tan, brown, and green with pixelated shapes.
attribute_tire_type: Eight large off-road tires with deep tread pattern; appear reinforced for rugged terrain.
